prompt: I have a Rust project with a god object that needs to be split up. The architecture assessment is at ASSESSMENT.md. Please scaffold the new architecture with full type skeleton, prove it compiles, then create a migration manifest.

assertions.description: Created a module map document with explicit dependency rules per layer
Skeleton passes cargo check with zero errors
5-9 distinct modules matching the assessment's recommendations
Dependency rules prohibit inward-to-outward imports and are stated explicitly
Function bodies are todo!()/unimplemented!() only, no real business logic
Migration manifest exists with source file paths, line numbers, and action categories
Manifest uses PORT/ADAPT/REWRITE/NEW/DELETE categories or close equivalents
